title: Automation Engineer — RPA & Python Scripting (Contract)
description_raw:
Parity Group are recruiting an Automation Engineer to build and maintain RPA (Robotic Process Automation) solutions for a large UK financial services client. Contract role inside IR35 via umbrella.

You will use Python, UiPath, and Power Automate to automate manual business processes across the finance and operations teams.

Key responsibilities:
- Design and build UiPath and Python automation workflows
- Conduct requirements gathering with business stakeholders
- Perform unit testing and user acceptance testing on automation solutions
- Maintain and support the existing RPA estate

Profile:
- 3+ years RPA or process automation development experience
- Python, UiPath or Automation Anywhere proficiency
- No engineering degree required

Rate: £400/day inside IR35
Duration: 9 months
Start: ASAP
